ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., NYSE, EUR/USD) */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, forex, futures) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "market_sector" TEXT /* Sector of the market (e.g., technology, finance, healthcare) */,
  "market_region" TEXT /* Region of the market (e.g., US, Europe, Asia) */,
  "market_currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument (e.g., Apple stock, EUR/USD option) */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the instrument is traded */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "instrument_sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument (e.g., technology, finance, healthcare) */,
  "instrument_industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument (e.g., software, banking, pharmaceuticals) */,
  "instrument_subindustry" TEXT /* Subindustry of the instrument (e.g., cloud computing, investment banking, biotechnology) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instruments_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest of the instrument */,
  "bid" REAL /* Bid price of the instrument */,
  "ask" REAL /* Ask price of the instrument */,
  "spread" REAL /* Spread between the bid and ask prices */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Trading status of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the client's account */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., individual, institutional, broker) */,
  "client_status" TEXT /* Status of the client (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the client referral (e.g., website, social media, referral program) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., trading, demo) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  "account_type_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the account type (e.g., margin, cash, IRA) */,
  "account_currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the account (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account placing the order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument being traded */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, filled, cancelled) */,
  "order_type_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the order type (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "order_time_in_force" TEXT /* Time in force for the order (e.g., day, GTC, GTD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being executed */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the instrument being traded */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., filled, partially filled, cancelled) */,
  "trade_fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "trade_commission" REAL /* Commission associated with the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic result */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being analyzed */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analysis */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the analysis (e.g., trend, sentiment) */,
  "analytic_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., technical, fundamental, sentiment) */,
  "analytic_model" TEXT /* Model used for the analysis (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "analytic_result_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the dashboard */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being displayed */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout configuration of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., trading, analysis, reporting) */,
  "dashboard_layout_type" TEXT /* Layout type of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart, table) */,
  "dashboard_component" TEXT /* Components used in the dashboard (e.g., charts, tables, news feeds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client receiving the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being monitored */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition triggering the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the condition */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume, news) */,
  "alert_condition_detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the alert condition */,
  "alert_action" TEXT /* Action taken when the alert is triggered (e.g., send email, send SMS, execute trade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument related to the news */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "news_source" TEXT /* Source of the news (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters, CNBC) */,
  "news_category" TEXT /* Category of the news (e.g., market, economic, company) */,
  "news_sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being related */,
  "related_instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related instrument */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., correlation, causality) */,
  "relationship_strength" REAL /* Strength of the relationship between instruments */,
  "relationship_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the relationship between instruments (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_related_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
